service.name: Meta Ads API (Facebook/Instagram Ads)
service.description_for_ai: Advertise on Facebook and Instagram. Create campaigns, ad sets, ads. Access detailed analytics. 3B+ users reach. Powerful audience targeting: interests, demographics, lookalikes, custom audiences.

auth.how_to_get: Create app at https://developers.facebook.com/apps — requires ad account
auth.cost: Free API. Ad spend charged per campaign

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get Facebook/Instagram ad performance: reach, impressions, clicks, spend, conversions, ROAS by campaign, ad set, or ad.
